items.title: Heated Rivalry, Off Campus driving ice hockey boom in Canberra

children.content: Women now outnumber men as attendees to Canberra Brave ice hockey games — thanks in part to a surge in popularity for the sport inspired by the recent shows Heated Rivalry and Off Campus.

items.title: A man fled a 'bounty' in Canberra. Months later, he was dead in Brisbane

children.content: Neil Tracey's death was ruled an overdose in what investigators would call an open and shut case. His family are questioning if police knew about the bounty that led him to flee his hometown.

items.title: ACT education minister censured in Assembly as schools close for strike

items.title: Parton says Canberrans are 'more vulnerable' after budget's release

children.content: The Canberra Liberals and the ACT Greens issue their responses to the ACT budget, criticising the government's fiscal plan, principally around cost of living, transport and overall management of the territory's finances.

articles.title: Canberrans looking for cost-of-living relief in ACT budget might be left wanting

articles.title: 'A footballer's dream': From humble beginings to the world stage

items.title: Feral sambar deer likely brought to SA for hunting purposes

children.content: One of Australia's largest feral deer species was spotted in SA's Riverland for the first time earlier this month. While its existence is being investigated, the Invasive Species Council says it was likely transported across state lines for hunting purposes.

items.title: Independence leader vanishes after changing sides to support Indonesia's government

children.content: A key Indigenous leader in West Papua appeared in a documentary criticising an Indonesian government program, but then changed sides and disappeared. Her family suspects foul play.
